event_title: [lu.ma/_ai registration required] ZML: a new AI stack written in Zig!
title: ZML: a new AI stack written in Zig!
description: Steeve Morin, the creator of ZML, a new AI stack written in Zig, is coming to SF from Paris. This is a fantastic opportunity to learn more about how AI actually works -- from training to inference, and speed it up. https://github.com/zml **We need a venue for this event in San Francisco** fitting at least 50 people. Email alexy@chiefscientist.org if you have one! You have to hold a valid [ticket](https://lu.ma/6mad0am2) from lu.ma/_ai and a matching Photo ID to get in.
